description: Apply project-level exclusion rules on the in-memory dataset before DB write. Exclusion decisions are per-project: BOM project keeps all data (D-155), ECR/ECN filters RD-/PE- prefixes at query layer. This node's job is to produce the final row set plus a reasoned exclusion report, NOT to write to DB.

confirmed_structure.description: The structure object approved in confirm_with_user (same shape as detect_structure output_schema, minus anomalies).

exclusion_policy.description: Explicit policy for THIS ingestion. Leader derives from project conventions and passes in.

mode.description: keep_all = BOM-style full ingest (D-155). exclude_prefixes = drop rows whose part-number column starts with listed prefixes. exclude_status = drop rows by status column match. custom = Leader-supplied SQL/python predicate.

part_number_columns.description: Explicit list of columns to scan for prefix match. If empty, downstream heuristically picks columns containing 'part_number', 'part_no', 'item_no'.

custom_predicate.description: Optional Python lambda-style expression (row dict → bool). Used when mode=custom.

operation_id.description: UUID/timestamp-based id stamped on every row in the downstream ingest_to_db step (_operation_id column). Required by the check_exclusion validator in scope=current_batch mode.

rows_in.description: Total rows read from source BEFORE exclusion.

rows_out.description: Rows that survived exclusion and will be passed to ingest_to_db.

exclusion_summary.description: One entry per exclusion rule actually fired. Empty if mode=keep_all.

sample_keys.description: Up to 5 example part numbers / keys excluded, for Leader verification.

filtered_dataset_path.description: Temp path holding the filtered rows (parquet/csv). Consumed by ingest_to_db, deleted on success.

warnings.description: Non-fatal concerns to surface: e.g. 'no part_number-like column found; exclusion rules inactive', 'PANJIT -AU suffix detected — confirm intent'.
